name: Fruit and Turkey Salad with Poppy Seed Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 package romaine blend mixed salad greens, 10 ounces
3 medium kiwi fruit, peeled and cut into chunks
1/3 cup purchased poppy seed dressing (or honey Dijon)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except salad dressing; toss.
2. Just before serving, pour the dressing over the salad; toss gently.
